chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 385 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.10315/2023 (Urgency). 2. For orders on CMA No.10316/2023 (Compromise). 18.07.2023 Mr. Farhan-ul-Hassan, Advocate for the plaintiff a/w Ms. Saadia Sumera Bajwa Advocate and Plaintiff’s authorized representative Akash Babu (CNIC No.45203-9513992-1) Sardar Ali Sher Khan, AAG. a/w Farhan Hameed (CNIC No.42201-0553401-7), Manager Planning, (T&O), Sindh Lakha Coal Mining Company/Chairman Auction Committee, Karachi, on behalf of Defendant No.1. Defendant No.2 Mushtaque Ali Panwar (CNIC No.41302-0773941-7), General Manager (T&O), Sindh Lakha Coal Mining Company/Chairman Auction Committee, Karachi............. 1. Granted. 2. Plaintiff has moved this application under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC. In the circumstances and with the consent of all the parties and their Counsel present in Court the application is converted into an Application under Order XXIII Rule 1 CPC, whereafter Plaintiff has made a motion for withdrawal of the suit. The Plaintiff present in person and Plaintiff’s Counsel have no objection. Motion is granted. The Defendant No.2 Announcement of Evaluation Report Reference No.SLCMC/DGM/R/1039 dated 20.03.2023 and letter of acceptance/award Reference No.SLCMC/Proc/2023/1041, dated 29.03.2023 and Reference No.SLCMC/Pro/2023/1040 dated 29.03.2023 for category “B” as placed by the Plaintiff are taken on record. The suit stands dismissed with no orders as to costs. J U D G E
